title: Get Embeddings Dimensions (MLX)
cap_description: Query the dimensionality of embeddings for a given MLX model
documentation:
## Purpose

Reports the vector size that an MLX embedding model produces. Requires Apple Silicon. Use this before creating a vector index so you know how many dimensions to allocate.

## Inputs

- A model spec pointing to an MLX embedding model directory or HuggingFace repo. Defaults to `all-MiniLM-L6-v2-4bit`.

## Outputs

A single integer: the number of dimensions in each embedding vector this model produces.

## Notes

- Reads model configuration only — no inference is run, so it is fast.
- MLX models are quantized for efficiency on Apple Silicon; verify that the quantization level is compatible with your accuracy requirements.
- See also: [Generate Vector Embeddings (MLX)](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:mlx;in="media:textable";ml-model;op=generate_embeddings;out="media:embedding-vector;textable;record")

args.arg_description: Path to MLX embedding model directory
